title: Tadalafil 5mg Daily: The Once-a-Day Dose
titleHtml: Tadalafil 5mg Daily: the once-a-day dose behind a growing body of research.
deck: Most people know tadalafil as an ED pill taken before sex. The low-dose, once-daily version, 5mg every day, is FDA-approved to treat two conditions at once, and a growing body of research is now examining what that steady daily dose may do for the heart and brain.
metaDescription: Most people know tadalafil as an ED pill taken before sex. The low-dose, once-daily version, 5mg every day, is FDA-approved to treat two conditions at once, and a growing body of research is now examining what that steady daily dose may do for the heart and brain. What the science actually shows.
